## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Include any screenshots if applicable.
- [ ] UI / UX Desktop & Mobile Review
- [ ] Local build (`npm run build`) and dev server check
- [ ] Middleware security checks (Auth protection)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the clean-code and architectural style guidelines of Momentum OS
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or linting errors
